div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
1. Runs daily-driver health
to inspect protected
artifacts plus systemd
restart and journal budgets

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
2. Checks authenticated
daemon readiness over HTTP

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
3. Checks schema, integrity,
counts, and storage headroom

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
4. Checks guarded-root
identity, readiness, and
capacity

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
5. Checks reservations,
filesystem accounting,
capacity, and latest
automatic drain

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Sole local operator who
browses with Windows Chrome
and searches, reviews, and
deletes local browser-memory
records.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Authenticated loopback API
for capture, read/admin/media
operations, and query-only
bmd.x-observations v1 export.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Command-line interface for
serving/admin operations,
direct storage/health
workflows, and standalone
mutation-free X observation
export.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Durable text/metadata
authority including migration
ledger, capture observations,
and immutable observation
ingest sequences.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Bounded disposable
image/video/audio bytes under
the configured media root;
explicit external roots
require mount and
identity-marker proof before
access.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Opt-in durable outage buffer
beneath the local WSL data
root; admission counts
committed files and distinct
in-flight SQLite
reservations, and drain
verifies bytes before tier
transition/source cleanup.
